title: humboltia perpusilla
intro: Humboltia perpusilla, also known as the small-fruited Humboldtia, is a plant species native to India, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which are known to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Humboltia perpusilla include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, the seeds are often dried and powdered, then consumed as a tea or added to formulations for its medicinal effects.
